title: melicope benguetensis
intro: Melicope benguetensis, also known as Benguet melicope, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Melicope benguetensis include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
